title: cyclosorus pricei
intro: Cyclosorus pricei, also known as the Price's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus pricei include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction by boiling its leaves in water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent.
